title: BEM-550.3 runtime curator intake
objective: Implement BEM-550.3 Runtime curator intake. Create governance/protocols/CURATOR_RUNTIME_INTAKE.md, scripts/curator_runtime_intake.py, .github/workflows/curator-intake.yml, report and proof. Requirements: external sources gpt/claude/telegram enter only through curator; validate trace_id, source, task_type, title, objective; reject duplicate trace_id; write curator_intake_validation and curator_assignment to governance/transport/results.jsonl; update governance/state/role_cycle_state.json; workflow_dispatch only, no schedule, no issue comments, no secrets. No issue comments.
